design_philosophy.archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Authority, Clarity, Truth) mixed with Archetype 1 (Trust)
design_philosophy.visual_style: Clean, dense data, high legibility, subtle depth

typography.instructions: Use Plus Jakarta Sans for all Headings (h1-h4). Use Manrope for all body text, labels, and especially numerical data (tables, charts, balances). Use JetBrains Mono for transaction IDs or API keys if visible.

colors.contrast_rules: Text must meet APCA standards. Never use pure #000000. Use #0F172A (Dark Slate) instead.

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind default but prioritized: p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12, p-16

grid_system.dashboard: Bento Grid Mode B: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6
grid_system.marketing: The Tetris Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 shadow-sm px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-white hover:bg-destructive/90 shadow-sm px-6 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-all

cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 p-6
cards.highlight: bg-slate-900 text-white rounded-xl shadow-lg p-6 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-lg px-4 py-2.5 text-sm transition-all

navigation.desktop_sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-slate-900 text-slate-300 p-6 flex flex-col border-r border-slate-800
navigation.mobile_bottom: fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-slate-200 p-3 flex justify-around items-center z-50
navigation.top_header: sticky top-0 z-20 w-full bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100 px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-between

charts.style: clean, minimal grid lines, custom tooltips with glassmorphism

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -10 }}

instructions_to_main_agent: Install 'lucide-react' for icons if not present.
Configure Tailwind with the specified colors and fonts.
Use 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text.
Implement the 'Bento Grid' layout for the dashboard.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and focus states.
Prioritize PWA features: responsive design, touch targets, and offline readiness.
For the Landing Page, use the 'Tetris Grid' layout.
For Forms, use Shadcn UI components but customize the styling to match the corporate theme.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
